Power City Builder Documentation
================================

.. image:: ../../assets/graphics/ResZone4.png
   :width: 200
   :alt: Power City Builder VIP Building

Welcome to the official documentation for **Power City Builder v1.0.1**.
This is a stylized isometric city management game built with Pygame, featuring complex 
power grid simulation, citizen education systems, and dynamic satisfaction logic.

Getting Started
---------------

To run the game from source, ensure you have your Python environment active and install the dependencies:

.. code-block:: bash

   pip install pygame-ce noise pathfinding-python

Then, launch the game:

.. code-block:: bash

   python main.py

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2
   :caption: Developer Reference:

   modules
